meta.note: No full chief-architect-repo-understanding audit has been run yet as of this file's creation. Everything below is seeded from incidental verification during Phase 20/21 execution and the apps/web episode, not a systematic pass. Treat unlisted areas as unknown, not as 'checked and fine'.

architecture.notes: Owns all state, persistence, orchestration. Feature modules under src/features/. Real jest suite, 298 suites / 3154 tests passing as of last run.
Stateless analysis service. Receives fully-assembled requests from backend, never queries a DB directly. Real mastery/retention/recommendation logic ported in during Phase 20 (P20-007/008/009).

Marked reference-only as of P20-015. Held the original weighted-mastery/retention/recommendation algorithms later ported into services/aim-engine. Not verified whether zero live imports remain repo-wide as of this memory's creation -- last explicit check was during P20-007/008/009 work, not re-verified since.
Real Flutter SDK pinned via .metadata (3.44.1 / Dart 3.12.1 at last check). 838 tests passing as of last full run. Voice Teacher + AI Teacher chat unified onto ai_chat_messages as of Phase 21.
Has its own admin/notifications, admin/analytics, admin/ai-teacher sections -- confirmed to overlap with apps/web's admin-* features.
Has its own CI workflow (student-web.yml). No parent-dashboard equivalent found inside it.

~132-144 files: Parent Dashboard (billing/reports/checkout/notifications) + admin-notifications/admin-ai/admin-analytics + a status page. NO CI workflow exists for it (unlike admin-dashboard.yml and student-web.yml). Deleted on chore/remove-apps-web (merged PR #1306), then restored verbatim on chore/restore-apps-web from archive/apps-web-backup after the user asked to restore it. As of last check, current state on main depends on whether chore/restore-apps-web has since been merged -- re-verify before assuming either way. Admin-* features here likely duplicate apps/admin-dashboard's; parent-dashboard has no known equivalent elsewhere in this repo.

rls_status.notes: Surfaced by Supabase advisor as critical: fully exposed to anon/authenticated roles.
Same advisory batch -- notable since this table drives course-gating decisions.

database.migration_history_notes: Chronological through 20260704020000_decouple_voice_audio_assets_from_voice_messages as of this memory's creation. Deployed via mcp__Supabase__apply_migration in this environment (no local DATABASE_URL available; npx prisma migrate deploy was the documented house-style command but not what was actually run in this session). schema.prisma kept in sync manually after each apply.

apis.contract_sync_status: aim-engine-contract.spec.ts confirmed to already cover all P20-005..P20-009 request/response field additions as of P20-016 (skill_mastery_context, recentAttempts, retentionHistory, etc.) -- verified by direct reading, not just trusting a doc.

ported_modules.name: RecommendationEngine (12-action cascade)
ported_modules.notes: Ported P20-009; response schema kind enum stayed 3-value, mapped down from the 12 action types via _ACTION_TYPE_TO_KIND_REASON in aim_analysis_pipeline.py.

ai_engine.services_api_status: Documented reference-only as of P20-015. Not independently re-verified in this session that zero live imports remain repo-wide.

decisions_log.decision: Git identity for all commits/pushes on this repo is GHOST3030 / ahmedalalawi41@gmail.com, never Claude/Anthropic attribution.
decisions_log.context: Set explicitly at start of Phase 21 work; applies to all subsequent sessions.

decisions_log.decision: Agent must never open PRs -- user opens/merges all PRs manually.
Any multi-task batch of work must be fully tested (build + full test suite) before pushing; failures must not be discovered after landing.

phase_history.notes: All 23 tasks merged to main via individual PRs (#1278-#1302 range, plus #1294 for P20-016). P20-016 (contract test + e2e smoke test) confirmed the root-cause pipeline fix actually works end-to-end.

phase_history.source_doc: local planning file (not committed to repo): phase21fluttervoicesynctasks.md, uploaded by user
phase_history.notes: Executed in two batches: P21-001..010 (PR #1303) and P21-011..021 (PR #1304). A follow-up task P21-021b (not in the original plan) fixed a real latent bug found while decoupling voice_audio_assets from voice_messages: AudioUploadService was still checking session ownership against the frozen voice_sessions table. Merged as PR #1305. Note: one background-agent run during this phase reported completion prematurely while still actively working -- verify agent completion claims against actual git log/status, don't trust the report alone.

known_issues.summary: voice_audio_assets.message_id (FK to legacy voice_messages) made nullable; new rows use ai_chat_message_id instead.

AudioUploadService checked ownership against voice_sessions, which stopped receiving new rows as of P21-007 -- would 403 every upload for a post-P21-007 session once VoiceMessageSubmitModule gets wired into the live app (it is currently NOT wired into VoiceTeacherModule, so this was latent, not an active incident).
8 tables have RLS disabled and are fully exposed to anon/authenticated Supabase roles (see database.rls_status above).
.github/dependabotggggggg.yml has a typo'd filename so GitHub never actually reads it as a dependabot config; it still references a directory: "/apps/web" entry for npm ecosystem monitoring.
apps/web has no CI workflow at all, unlike admin-dashboard and student-web.

open_questions.question: Is apps/web's Parent Dashboard actually the live, in-production parent-facing UI, or has it already been superseded by something outside this repo?
Current merge state of chore/restore-apps-web -- was it merged after being pushed?
Does services/api genuinely have zero live imports repo-wide today, or has that drifted since P20-015/017?

prisma generate fails in this sandbox environment due to a @prisma/client@7.8.0 vs prisma@6.19.3 version mismatch -- is this environment-specific or does it affect real deploys? App uses raw pg queries via DatabaseService, so it hasn't blocked anything yet.

environment.note: Not systematically audited yet. Only incidentally confirmed: services/backend-api requires DATABASE_URL for prisma CLI operations (not required for the app itself, which uses raw pg via DatabaseService); AIM_ENGINE_SERVICE_TOKEN, STT/TTS provider keys required for some backend e2e test setups (test-only placeholder values used in test env).

ci_cd.notes: List of workflow filenames only -- contents/triggers of each not individually audited yet.
